### Fix 3
Line: 128
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
Line 129: `variant={ButtonVariant.control}` — The value `control` still exists in the new type (`'control'` is in both old and new). No actual change needed here; the incident is informational since `control` is still a valid value.

### Fix 2: InputGroup family migration — children must be wrapped in `InputGroupItem`
Lines 117-135: The `<InputGroup>` contains two direct children: `<TextInput>` (line 118) and `<Button>` (line 128). In PF v6, all children of `<InputGroup>` must be wrapped in `<InputGroupItem>`. I need to wrap both children in `<InputGroupItem>`.

I need to import `InputGroupItem` from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
Lines 128-134: The `<Button>` contains icon children (`{passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}`). Since this button contains ONLY icon content (no text), I need to move the icon to the `icon` prop and make the Button self-closing. However, with a ternary expression, I'll use `icon={passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}`.

Let me apply all three fixes:

arguments.after: import { Button, ButtonVariant, InputGroup, InputGroupItem, TextInput } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Button, ButtonVariant, InputGroup, TextInput } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<InputGroup>
          <InputGroupItem isFill>
            <TextInput
              spellCheck="false"
              isRequired
              type={passwordHidden ? 'password' : 'text'}
              id={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret}
              name={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret}
              value={applicationCredentialSecret}
              onChange={onChangeFactory(OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret)}
              validated={applicationCredentialSecretValidation.type}
            />
          </InputGroupItem>
          <InputGroupItem>
            <Button
              variant={ButtonVariant.control}
              onClick={onClickTogglePassword}
              aria-label={passwordHidden ? 'Show password' : 'Hide password'}
              icon={passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}
            />
          </InputGroupItem>
        </InputGroup>
arguments.before:
<InputGroup>
          <TextInput
            spellCheck="false"
            isRequired
            type={passwordHidden ? 'password' : 'text'}
            id={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret}
            name={OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret}
            value={applicationCredentialSecret}
            onChange={onChangeFactory(OpenstackSecretFieldsId.ApplicationCredentialSecret)}
            validated={applicationCredentialSecretValidation.type}
          />
          <Button
            variant={ButtonVariant.control}
            onClick={onClickTogglePassword}
            aria-label={passwordHidden ? 'Show password' : 'Hide password'}
          >
            {passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}
          </Button>
        </InputGroup>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied. Let me verify there are no unused imports or artifacts:

- `InputGroupItem` is now imported and used (lines 118, 130) ✓
- `EyeIcon` and `EyeSlashIcon` are still used in the `icon` prop (line 135) ✓
- `ButtonVariant.control` remains valid in PF v6 (still in the type union) ✓
- Button is now self-closing with `icon` prop instead of icon children ✓
- No dead imports or unused variables ✓

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (`control` value)
**No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.control` is still valid in the new type union (`'control'` exists in both old and new). The incident was informational — no code modification required.

### Fix 2 — InputGroup family migration (wrap children in `InputGroupItem`)
**Applied.** 
- Added `InputGroupItem` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core` (line 7)
- Wrapped `<TextInput>` (the text input child) in `<InputGroupItem isFill>` (lines 118-129) — `isFill` ensures the text input stretches to fill available space
- Wrapped `<Button>` (the toggle password button) in `<InputGroupItem>` (lines 130-137)

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
**Applied.**
- Moved the icon ternary expression `{passwordHidden ? <EyeIcon /> : <EyeSlashIcon />}` from Button children to the `icon` prop (line 135)
- Made the `<Button>` element self-closing (line 136) since it now has no children
